text.value: The resource CapabilityStatement/ti-flow-fachdienst-server could usefully have an OID assigned (OIDs are easy to assign - see https://build.fhir.org/ig/FHIR/fhir-tools-ig/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html#ig-parameters-auto-oid-root)

The resource CodeSystem/GEM-ERP-CS-AvailabilityStatus should have an OID assigned to cater for possible use with OID based terminology systems e.g. CDA usage (OIDs are easy to assign - see https://build.fhir.org/ig/FHIR/fhir-tools-ig/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html#ig-parameters-auto-oid-root)

The resource CodeSystem/GEM-ERP-CS-DocumentType should have an OID assigned to cater for possible use with OID based terminology systems e.g. CDA usage (OIDs are easy to assign - see https://build.fhir.org/ig/FHIR/fhir-tools-ig/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html#ig-parameters-auto-oid-root)

The resource CodeSystem/GEM-ERP-CS-FlowType should have an OID assigned to cater for possible use with OID based terminology systems e.g. CDA usage (OIDs are easy to assign - see https://build.fhir.org/ig/FHIR/fhir-tools-ig/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html#ig-parameters-auto-oid-root)

The resource CodeSystem/tiflow-operation-outcome-details-cs should have an OID assigned to cater for possible use with OID based terminology systems e.g. CDA usage (OIDs are easy to assign - see https://build.fhir.org/ig/FHIR/fhir-tools-ig/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html#ig-parameters-auto-oid-root)

The resource ConceptMap/TIFLOW-CM-TelemetryDataStatusCodes could usefully have an OID assigned (OIDs are easy to assign - see https://build.fhir.org/ig/FHIR/fhir-tools-ig/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html#ig-parameters-auto-oid-root)

The resource ImplementationGuide/de.gematik.tiflow could usefully have an OID assigned (OIDs are easy to assign - see https://build.fhir.org/ig/FHIR/fhir-tools-ig/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html#ig-parameters-auto-oid-root)

The resource SearchParameter/TaskAcceptDateSP could usefully have an OID assigned (OIDs are easy to assign - see https://build.fhir.org/ig/FHIR/fhir-tools-ig/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html#ig-parameters-auto-oid-root)

The resource SearchParameter/TaskExpiryDateSP could usefully have an OID assigned (OIDs are easy to assign - see https://build.fhir.org/ig/FHIR/fhir-tools-ig/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html#ig-parameters-auto-oid-root)

The resource StructureDefinition/GEM-ERP-EX-AcceptDate could usefully have an OID assigned (OIDs are easy to assign - see https://build.fhir.org/ig/FHIR/fhir-tools-ig/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html#ig-parameters-auto-oid-root)

The resource StructureDefinition/GEM-ERP-EX-Beneficiary could usefully have an OID assigned (OIDs are easy to assign - see https://build.fhir.org/ig/FHIR/fhir-tools-ig/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html#ig-parameters-auto-oid-root)

The resource StructureDefinition/GEM-ERP-EX-ExpiryDate could usefully have an OID assigned (OIDs are easy to assign - see https://build.fhir.org/ig/FHIR/fhir-tools-ig/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html#ig-parameters-auto-oid-root)

The resource StructureDefinition/GEM-ERP-EX-PrescriptionType could usefully have an OID assigned (OIDs are easy to assign - see https://build.fhir.org/ig/FHIR/fhir-tools-ig/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html#ig-parameters-auto-oid-root)

The resource StructureDefinition/GEM-ERP-PR-Binary could usefully have an OID assigned (OIDs are easy to assign - see https://build.fhir.org/ig/FHIR/fhir-tools-ig/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html#ig-parameters-auto-oid-root)

The resource StructureDefinition/GEM-ERP-PR-Bundle could usefully have an OID assigned (OIDs are easy to assign - see https://build.fhir.org/ig/FHIR/fhir-tools-ig/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html#ig-parameters-auto-oid-root)

The resource StructureDefinition/GEM-ERP-PR-Composition could usefully have an OID assigned (OIDs are easy to assign - see https://build.fhir.org/ig/FHIR/fhir-tools-ig/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html#ig-parameters-auto-oid-root)

The resource StructureDefinition/GEM-ERP-PR-Device could usefully have an OID assigned (OIDs are easy to assign - see https://build.fhir.org/ig/FHIR/fhir-tools-ig/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html#ig-parameters-auto-oid-root)

The resource StructureDefinition/GEM-ERP-PR-Digest could usefully have an OID assigned (OIDs are easy to assign - see https://build.fhir.org/ig/FHIR/fhir-tools-ig/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html#ig-parameters-auto-oid-root)
The slice definition for Signature.type has a maximum of 1 but the slices add up to a maximum of 2. Check that this is what is intended

The resource StructureDefinition/GEM-ERP-PR-Signature could usefully have an OID assigned (OIDs are easy to assign - see https://build.fhir.org/ig/FHIR/fhir-tools-ig/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html#ig-parameters-auto-oid-root)

The resource StructureDefinition/audit-event-rest could usefully have an OID assigned (OIDs are easy to assign - see https://build.fhir.org/ig/FHIR/fhir-tools-ig/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html#ig-parameters-auto-oid-root)

The resource StructureDefinition/ti-feature-definition could usefully have an OID assigned (OIDs are easy to assign - see https://build.fhir.org/ig/FHIR/fhir-tools-ig/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html#ig-parameters-auto-oid-root)

The resource StructureDefinition/ti-flow-feature-wf160 could usefully have an OID assigned (OIDs are easy to assign - see https://build.fhir.org/ig/FHIR/fhir-tools-ig/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html#ig-parameters-auto-oid-root)

The resource StructureDefinition/ti-flow-feature-wf169 could usefully have an OID assigned (OIDs are easy to assign - see https://build.fhir.org/ig/FHIR/fhir-tools-ig/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html#ig-parameters-auto-oid-root)

The resource StructureDefinition/tiflow-communication could usefully have an OID assigned (OIDs are easy to assign - see https://build.fhir.org/ig/FHIR/fhir-tools-ig/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html#ig-parameters-auto-oid-root)

The resource StructureDefinition/tiflow-op-accept-bundle could usefully have an OID assigned (OIDs are easy to assign - see https://build.fhir.org/ig/FHIR/fhir-tools-ig/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html#ig-parameters-auto-oid-root)

The resource StructureDefinition/tiflow-operation-outcome could usefully have an OID assigned (OIDs are easy to assign - see https://build.fhir.org/ig/FHIR/fhir-tools-ig/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html#ig-parameters-auto-oid-root)

The resource StructureDefinition/tiflow-order-task could usefully have an OID assigned (OIDs are easy to assign - see https://build.fhir.org/ig/FHIR/fhir-tools-ig/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html#ig-parameters-auto-oid-root)

The resource ValueSet/GEM-ERP-VS-AvailabilityStatus should have an OID assigned to cater for possible use with OID based terminology systems e.g. CDA usage (OIDs are easy to assign - see https://build.fhir.org/ig/FHIR/fhir-tools-ig/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html#ig-parameters-auto-oid-root)

The resource ValueSet/GEM-ERP-VS-DocumentType should have an OID assigned to cater for possible use with OID based terminology systems e.g. CDA usage (OIDs are easy to assign - see https://build.fhir.org/ig/FHIR/fhir-tools-ig/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html#ig-parameters-auto-oid-root)

The resource ValueSet/GEM-ERP-VS-FlowType should have an OID assigned to cater for possible use with OID based terminology systems e.g. CDA usage (OIDs are easy to assign - see https://build.fhir.org/ig/FHIR/fhir-tools-ig/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html#ig-parameters-auto-oid-root)

The resource ValueSet/tiflow-operation-outcome-details-vs should have an OID assigned to cater for possible use with OID based terminology systems e.g. CDA usage (OIDs are easy to assign - see https://build.fhir.org/ig/FHIR/fhir-tools-ig/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html#ig-parameters-auto-oid-root)

The resource ValueSet/tiflow-order-task-status-vs should have an OID assigned to cater for possible use with OID based terminology systems e.g. CDA usage (OIDs are easy to assign - see https://build.fhir.org/ig/FHIR/fhir-tools-ig/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html#ig-parameters-auto-oid-root)
